jurisdiction: Prince William County, Virginia — Board of County Supervisors

primary_source.how_to_enumerate_meetings: GET https://pwcgov.granicus.com/core/Handlers/media/votelog.ashx?action=search&viewId=23&meetingBodyId=1&pageindex=N — returns JSON array VoteLogMeetings with clip_id, date, AgendaLink, MinutesLink, and a Votes array. Also: RSS feed at ViewPublisherRSS.php?view_id=23&mode=agendas enumerates all meetings with clip_id GUIDs. HTML archive at ViewPublisher.php?view_id=23 lists meetings by year with Agenda/Briefs/Video columns.
primary_source.era_covered: Current through at least July 7 2026; archive depth not fully probed but ViewPublisher shows multiple year-tabs going back into prior years

second_source.system: Granicus MinutesViewer HTML ('Briefs') — an independently rendered action-minutes document separate from the VoteLog JSON
second_source.what_it_affirms: The MinutesViewer HTML for each meeting lists every agenda item with its outcome (APPROVED / DEFERRED / DENIED), mover (1:), seconder (2:), aggregate result (Unanimous / roll-call), absentees, and assigned Resolution/Ordinance number — independently formatted from the VoteLog JSON. Verified for Jun 23 2026 meeting: item 3.A shows 'APPROVED: Approve the Minutes of May 19, 2026 1: Bailey 2: Boddye / Unanimous / ABSENT FROM MEETING: Vega Res. No. 26-378'. NOTE: A Laserfiche WebLink portal also exists at https://lfportal.pwcgov.org/weblink but requires browser cookies/session auth and could not be verified for content. A legacy eservice.pwcgov.org/documents/bocs/agendas/ path serving resolution PDFs was found in search results (e.g. /2022/0405/4-A.pdf) but returned HTTP 500 on direct directory access — likely a partially deprecated document store.

votes_located: PRIMARY — Granicus VoteLog JSON API: GET https://pwcgov.granicus.com/core/Handlers/media/votelog.ashx?action=search&viewId=23&meetingBodyId=1&pageindex=1 returns structured per-item, per-attendee votes. Verified example from Jul 7 2026 meeting (clip_id 3859): {\"AgendaItemText\":\"4.A) Approve the Minutes of June 2, 2026\", \"MotionText\":\"Motion to Approve Moved by Supervisor Stewart, seconded by Supervisor Boddye.\", \"VoteResult\":\"Pass\", \"VoteDetails\":[{\"Attendee\":{\"Name\":\"Chair Jefferson\"},\"Vote\":\"yes\"}, {\"Attendee\":{\"Name\":\"Supervisor Vega\"},\"Vote\":\"abstain\"}, ...]}. Vote types enumerated by getformdata: Yes, No, Abstain, Absent, Recuse. SECONDARY — MinutesViewer HTML for same meetings confirms aggregate outcome and resolution number in human-readable form (e.g. '1: Bailey 2: Boddye / Unanimous / ABSENT FROM MEETING: Vega Res. No. 26-378').

access_constraints: All Granicus endpoints are publicly accessible with no authentication required. The VoteLog JSON API (votelog.ashx) responds without any API key. The Laserfiche WebLink portal (lfportal.pwcgov.org) is publicly reachable but requires a browser session cookie to render content. The AgendaViewer SSL certificate had a hostname mismatch (granicus_production_attachments.s3.amazonaws.com) causing SSL errors on direct PDF attachment fetches — the HTML viewer pages themselves are accessible. No rate limiting or CAPTCHA observed on Granicus.
open_questions: How far back does the Granicus archive extend? The ViewPublisher shows multi-year tabs but the oldest year was not enumerated within budget.
The Laserfiche WebLink portal (lfportal.pwcgov.org/weblink) may contain an independent minutes/resolution archive — its content and era coverage could not be verified due to cookie-auth requirement.

The legacy eservice.pwcgov.org document path served resolution PDFs in at least 2022 — it is unclear whether this path is still maintained or fully deprecated, and whether it covers pre-Granicus records.
The 'Board Joint Interjurisdictional' body (id=41) appeared recently in the VoteLog form data — its meeting history depth and scope are unverified.
Does the VoteLog search endpoint support date-range filtering? The JS source suggests it does but parameters were not fully enumerated.
